arts.ttl: Man Utd star already giving Ruben Amorim a PROBLEM
arts.sum: Yet it also gives him a major decision to make over the misfiring Marcus Rashford, a player influential in setting the tone of the squad at Man Utd and one unlikely to take kindly to being dropped by a new head coach. Amad Diallo ’s performance for interim boss Ruud van Nistelrooy against PAOK on Thursday in the Europa League was one that demanded attention.

Manchester United finally celebrated a Europa League victory after more than a year of accumulating only draws and defeats, doing so under the leadership of Ruud van Nistelrooy in what will be his final match in charge of the team in Europe during this interim period. It took 380 days for the Red Devils to celebrate a victory in Europe, and they did so at home, under the support of the Old Trafford crowd, with Amad Diallo as the standout player of the night in the fourth matchday of the second most prestigious club tournament on the continent.

arts.ttl: Three moments vs PAOK told Ruben Amorim reality about Amad amid Man United contract decision
arts.sum: Amad is not quite the finished package just yet but has the ability to get Manchester United fans off their seat like few others.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is keeping his promise to Ruben Amorim ahead of Manchester United job swap
arts.sum: Man Utd beat PAOK 2-0 in the Europa League thanks to an excellent individual performance from Amad.
